mano_cua.result_summary: CDK Virtual Scroll集成存在严重视觉bug：ngx-scrollbar滑块渲染为极小蓝色圆点而非正常矩形滑块与轨道。滚动功能本身部分正常（鼠标滚轮可滚动内容、拖拽圆点可跳转位置、滑块位置在比例上与内容同步），但滑块视觉表现严重异常，几乎不可见不可用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: CDK Virtual Scroll Example found with 1000 items. ngx-scrollbar IS rendered but thumb appears as extremely tiny blue dot instead of proper rectangular thumb with track. Mouse wheel scrolling works correctly (content loads new items). Scrollbar thumb position does synchronize with scroll position. Dragging the blue dot works for content navigation. Key Visual Bug: scrollbar thumb in CDK Virtual Scroll container is rendered as abnormally small blue dot instead of proper scrollbar thumb.
